sectionTitle: Access the Intelligence Layer of the Markets
sectionSubtitle: From research and exploration to full institutional-grade quantitative access — three tiers designed for every stage of systematic trading.
disclaimer: All plans provide informational AI-generated market signals. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

tiers.name: Research
tiers.tagline: Explore the platform and validate the models — free.
features: Basic backtesting (5-year lookback, 1,000 Monte Carlo paths)
notIncluded: CSL Consensus, Phi Breakout, Sentiment, Volatility Surface

tiers.name: Pro Trader
tiers.tagline: Real-time signals and full multi-asset coverage.

limits.signals: Momentum, Mean Reversion, Phi Breakout, Sentiment Aggregate
limits.assets: All equities (NYSE/NASDAQ/CBOE), top 50 crypto, 28 forex pairs

features: Real-time Momentum, Mean Reversion, Phi Breakout signals
All equities (S&P 500, Russell 2000, NASDAQ-100, global ADRs)
Top 50 crypto by market cap (aggregated CEX feed)
Full backtesting suite (10-year lookback, 10,000 Monte Carlo paths)

tiers.name: Quant
tiers.tagline: Full API access, CSL Consensus signals, and the complete backtesting suite.
tiers.dataLatency: Real-time (< 35ms priority pipeline for CSL Consensus)

limits.signals: All 6 signal types including CSL Consensus and Volatility Surface
limits.assets: All supported assets including equity options

features: All 6 signal types including CSL Consensus and Volatility Surface
Equity options coverage (full IV surface, OCC data feed)
Unlimited API calls with priority rate limit pools
Unlimited backtesting with parallel Monte Carlo (unlimited paths)
Custom signal parameter tuning via API
WebSocket + FIX protocol connectivity (FIX adapter on request)
Dedicated Slack channel with Heady quant team
